arts.ttl: Injured Liverpool star ruled out of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Liverpool will be without first choice goal keeper Alisson for their UEFA Champions League clash with Real Madrid. The Reds return to Premier League action this weekend ahead of hosting Los Blancos on November 27 at Anfield in a repeat of the 2021 final. However, head coach Arne Slot has offered a negative update on […] The post Injured Liverpool star ruled out of Real Madrid clash appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti finds surprise solution to Real Madrid crisis
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti could use Ferland Mendy as an emergency centre-back in lieu of January reinforcements, according to Spanish media. At least that is according to AS, which claims that Ancelotti has identified left-back Ferland Mendy as a player capable of stepping into a central position in the backline.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid considering shock bid for West Ham outcast
arts.sum: Real Madrid are weighing up a surprise move for West Ham United centre-back Nayef Aguerd, according to reports. Aguerd is currently on loan at fellow Spanish side Real Sociedad after falling out of favour at the London Stadium last season. West Ham in contact with possible Julen Lopetegui replacement! arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti identifies fresh centre-back option in his squad
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has earmarked another member of his squad as an option to fill in at centre-back over the weeks ahead. That’s according to Diario AS,…
